title: Deny unsafe shortcuts
description: Do not recommend disabling validation, weakening policy, broadening secrets, or suppressing warnings to make a security task pass.
body: Use when a build, test, integration, or deployment problem tempts the change to skip checks, disable scanners, remove authorization, relax CORS, broaden CSP, or ignore certificate errors. Do not use to block temporary local-only diagnostics that never ship and do not expose data. Actions: preserve the guard, diagnose the underlying failure, and propose a safer narrow exception only with explicit expiry and human approval. Validation signals include the guard still active, tests passing through the protected path, and no new broad allowlist. Risk boundary: production-facing relaxation or persistent bypass must be recorded as rejected or escalated.
